title: Connect Gmail to Claude  | Let AI Manage Your Emails Automatically
summary: Tutorial on connecting Gmail to Claude using a Gmail Connector to enable AI automation of email tasks. Claude can securely access emails, summarize unread messages, and draft replies. The video covers setup steps, security considerations, and practical prompting examples.
